concepts.name: Tangent Lines
concepts.short_definition: The line that touches a curve at a single point and has the same slope as the curve at that point.

concepts.name: Extrema
concepts.short_definition: The highest or lowest points on a function's graph within a given interval.

concepts.name: Critical Points
concepts.short_definition: Points where the derivative of a function is either zero or undefined.

concepts.name: First Derivative Test
concepts.short_definition: A method to determine if a critical point is a local maximum, local minimum, or neither by examining the sign of the first derivative.

concepts.name: Concavity
concepts.short_definition: Describes the curvature of a function's graph, whether it is bending upwards or downwards.

concepts.name: Inflection Points
concepts.short_definition: Points on a curve where the concavity changes.

concepts.name: Second Derivative Test
concepts.short_definition: A method to determine if a critical point is a local maximum or local minimum by examining the sign of the second derivative.

concepts.name: Optimization Problems
concepts.short_definition: Problems that involve finding the maximum or minimum value of a quantity subject to certain constraints.

concepts.name: Related Rates
concepts.short_definition: Problems involving the rates of change of multiple related quantities.

concepts.name: Curve Sketching
concepts.short_definition: Using calculus tools to accurately draw the graph of a function.
